title: Dibrugarh University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for University Librarian, University Dy Librarian Posts
short_info: Dibrugarh University Librarian, University Deputy Librarian Notification 2026 has been released on 04-05-2026 on the official website dibrugarhuniversity.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DU University Librarian, University Deputy Librarian Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have Master’s Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science, Ph.D. Degree with relevant 8-10 years of experience are eligible to apply for these University Librarian, University Deputy Librarian vacancies. The online application process for DU University Librarian, University

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science, Ph.D. Degree, Minimum 8-10 years of experience.
qualification.details: University Librarian: A Master's Degree in Library Science / Information Science / Documentation Science with at least 55% marks or an equivalent grade. At least 10 years as a Librarian at any level in University Library or 10 years of teaching experience as Assistant / Associate Professor in Library Science or 10 years of experience as a College Librarian. Evidence of innovative library services, including the integration of ICT in a library. A Ph.D. Degree in Library Science / Information Science / Documentation / Archives and Manuscript-keeping. University Deputy Librarian: A Master's Degree in Library Science / Information Science / Documentation Science, with at least 55% marks or an equivalent grade. 08 years of experience as an Assistant University Librarian / College Librarian. Evidence of Innovative Library services, including integration of ICT in library. A Ph.D. Degree in Library Science / Information Science / Documentation Science / Archives and Manuscript-keeping / Computerization of library.

salary_details.details: University Librarian: Rs. 1,44,200-2,18,200/- (Academic Level 14) University Deputy Librarian: Rs. 78,800-2,11,500/- (Academic Level 12)

selection_process: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for complete details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Dibrugarh University Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Dibrugarh University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Dibrugarh University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online submission of the application is 29th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the University Librarian post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of University Librarian. In total, Dibrugarh University is recruiting for 2 posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the University Librarian position?
faq.answer: A Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science with at least 55% marks, along with a Ph.D. and at least 10 years of relevant experience, is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the University Librarian post?
faq.answer: The salary for the University Librarian post is Rs. 1,44,200-2,18,200/- (Academic Level 14).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Dibrugarh University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 2,000/-. Please refer to the notification for details on fees for other categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official website of Dibrugarh University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is 4-5/2026.

faq.question: Q8. Does Dibrugarh University offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates should consult the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection procedure.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct link to download the official notification PDF will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article once released.
